name: Decorative Rod
description: Wall-mounted metal or wood rod with decorative finials. Visible above the curtain.

name: Ceiling Track
description: Recessed ceiling-mounted track. Hidden hardware, clean architectural look.

name: Wave Rail
description: Premium wave-fold rail system for soft, uniform pleats. Wall or ceiling mounted.

name: No Rod (Roller / Roman)
description: No external hardware. Used for roller blinds and Roman shades with built-in mechanism.
